description: Open the dataset '~/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25.csv' and perform a Reliability Analysis on the five Extraversion items: E1, E2, E3, E4, and E5. Items E1 ('Don't talk a lot') and E2 ('Find it difficult to approach others') are negatively worded and must be reverse-coded for the analysis. Ensure the results include the scale mean and standard deviation. Save the Jamovi project as '~/Documents/Jamovi/Extraversion_Reliability.omv' and create a text file report at '~/Documents/Jamovi/reliability_report.txt' containing the Cronbach's α (alpha) value, the Scale Mean, and the Scale Standard Deviation.
